name: FALISTRI
description: Dual analog function generator + dual cascaded frequency divider + four-quadrant multiplier + linear slew limiter. Each generator: triangle-core, four stages, rise/fall + independent shapes, loop/transient/hold modes, quadrature and AHDSR combinations.

controls.name: Trigger/Gate Button
controls.description: Manual trigger. LED lit when generator currently in rising stage of a To Rise cycle.

controls.name: Rise Time
controls.detail: Long range: 0.9 ms – 10 s · Short range: per Time Scale switch · CV via Rise CV input

controls.name: Fall Time
controls.description: Falling stage duration. In Hold mode, time after hold releases.
controls.detail: Long range: 0.9 ms – 10 s · CV via Fall CV input · V/Oct input inverse-modulates both

controls.name: Rise Shape
controls.detail: CCW: logarithmic · noon: linear · CW: exponential · independent of time

controls.name: Fall Shape
controls.detail: CCW: logarithmic · noon: linear · CW: exponential · waveshaper is post-core

controls.name: Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales the Attenuverted Output between +10 V and -10 V of the unipolar function.
controls.detail: CCW: inverted unipolar · noon: zero · CW: positive unipolar

controls.name: Time Scale Switch
controls.detail: up: long times (envelope/LFO) · down: short times (audio rate / microsecond LFO)

controls.name: Play Mode Switch
controls.detail: Loop: self-retriggers (LFO/oscillator) · Transient: one-shot AD · Hold: AHR (holds while gate high)

controls.name: Green Retrigger Switch (on back)
controls.detail: down: yellow-style retrigger always · up: On Rest — retrigger only during rest stage (formant/undertone generator)

controls.name: Quadrature Switch
controls.description: Chains the two generators into an interdependent quadrature pair. Forces green to To Rise mode.
controls.detail: right: quadrature ON · disables green's retrigger · green must be set to Hold for AHDSR

controls.name: DCFD Range 1 / Range 2
controls.description: Output voltage range of divider stages.
controls.detail: high: unipolar 0 V / +10 V · low: bipolar ±5 V

controls.name: Slew Rise / Slew Fall
controls.description: Independent rising / falling slew times for the slew input.

controls.name: 4QM Level
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator scaling the multiplier output.

inputs.name: Trigger/Gate Input
inputs.description: Fires the generator. Gate extends Hold stage in Hold mode; audio-rate signal accepted.
inputs.voltage: threshold >1.5 V · max ~6 kHz · 80 µs min pulse

inputs.name: Rise CV Input
inputs.description: Modulates rise time. Positive CV lengthens.

inputs.name: Fall CV Input
inputs.description: Modulates fall time. Positive CV lengthens.

inputs.name: V/Oct Input
inputs.description: Inverse-tracks both Rise and Fall. Positive CV shortens times, negative lengthens. Pitch source when generator is used as oscillator.

inputs.name: Force Loop Input
inputs.description: Gate-high forces the play mode to Loop regardless of physical switch position. Accepts audio-rate signal for experimental effects.

inputs.name: DCFD Input 1 / 2
inputs.description: Gate/trigger/audio input to frequency dividers. Semi-normalled in series — patching Input 2 only still produces 1/2 and 1/4 outputs.

inputs.name: 4QM Input 1
inputs.description: First multiplier input. Semi-normalled to yellow unipolar output.

inputs.name: 4QM Input 2
inputs.description: Second multiplier input. Semi-normalled to green bipolar output.

inputs.name: Slew Input
inputs.description: Signal slewed by the Linear Slew Limiter.

outputs.name: Bipolar Output (two dots)
outputs.description: ±5 V bipolar version of the function. Useful when using generator as audio-rate oscillator or bipolar LFO.

outputs.name: Unipolar Output (one dot)
outputs.description: 0 V / +10 V unipolar envelope output. Classic envelope feed.

outputs.name: Attenuverted Output
outputs.description: Attenuverter-scaled copy of the unipolar output.

outputs.name: End Of Rise (EOR)
outputs.description: Gate high for the duration of the falling stage (Transient/Loop mode). In Hold mode stays high through fall + held level.

outputs.name: End Of Fall (EOF)
outputs.description: Gate high from end-of-fall to start of next rise (Transient/Hold mode). Fast trigger in Loop mode at each cycle boundary.

outputs.name: DCFD Output 1 / 2
outputs.description: Successive /2 divisions. Output 1 = /2, Output 2 = /4 of input rising edges.
outputs.voltage: Range switch: unipolar 0/+10 V or bipolar ±5 V

outputs.name: 4QM Output
outputs.description: Four-quadrant multiplier result. VCA with bipolar signal → AM; both bipolar → ring mod; both unipolar → 2-quadrant.

outputs.name: Slew Output
outputs.description: Slew-limited version of Slew Input with independent rise/fall times.

outputs.name: Max Output (quadrature section)
outputs.description: Maximum of the two attenuverted outputs. Analog-OR for combining both generators into one envelope.

behaviors.name: Three play modes per generator
behaviors.description: Loop: function auto-retriggers at end — free-running LFO or oscillator. Transient: one-shot rise-then-fall (AD) fired by each trigger. Hold: signal above ~1.5 V holds at peak while high, falls on gate-low (AHR envelope). Time between hold and rise equals Rise time.

behaviors.name: Shapes independent of times
behaviors.description: Waveshaper sits after the triangle core, so shape morph does not change period. Any blending between logarithmic and exponential is freely achievable. Enables audio-rate waveshaping when generator runs as oscillator — two pots become a minimal waveshaper.

behaviors.name: Retrigger depends on stage
behaviors.description: Rise stage: ignored. Hold stage: ignored. Fall stage: jumps back up to the level at which fall began, fires new rise. Rest stage: fires new cycle. This lets FALISTRI produce clock-divided envelopes naturally — fast triggers drop through while slow cycles reset.

behaviors.name: V/Oct inverse tracking
behaviors.description: One CV patched to V/Oct inversely modulates both Rise and Fall simultaneously. Positive CV shortens both (pitch goes up when used as oscillator); negative lengthens. This is the pitch input when running as audio-rate oscillator.

behaviors.name: Force Loop overrides switch
behaviors.description: While high, the generator loops regardless of Transient/Hold setting. Release returns to switch-selected mode. Audio-rate signals at Force Loop produce rapid mode-toggling for complex sync-like effects.

behaviors.name: Green On Rest retrigger
behaviors.description: Green's retrigger only acts during rest stage. Running green faster than incoming triggers creates subharmonic division (/2, /3, /4…) of the master rate — formant/undertone generator behaviour found on EMS and old analog modulars.

behaviors.name: Quadrature chaining
behaviors.trigger: Quadrature switch right + green in Hold
behaviors.description: Enables chained envelope stages between the two generators. Sequence: yellow rise → green rise → yellow fall → green fall → cycle. With green in Hold + attenuverters for relative levels, this generates a full AHDSR envelope where yellow = A+R, green = H+D and Hold level.

behaviors.name: 4QM semi-normalled synth voice
behaviors.description: 4QM Input 1 ← yellow unipolar, 4QM Input 2 ← green bipolar by default. Run yellow as envelope and green as audio oscillator to get a one-module synth voice (oscillator × envelope VCA) at the 4QM output.

behaviors.name: DCFD as divider or flip-flop
behaviors.description: Clock input → /2, /4 outputs (classic division). Trigger input → flip-flop (output changes state on each trigger). Audio input → sub-octave generator producing -1 and -2 octaves. Random clock input → variable-length gate streams. Semi-normalled cascade lets one input feed both dividers.

behaviors.name: 4QM behaviour follows polarity
behaviors.trigger: bipolar vs unipolar signal at 4QM inputs
behaviors.description: Two quadrants: unipolar + bipolar — acts as linear VCA (AM). Four quadrants: both bipolar — ring modulation. Both unipolar: two-quadrant multiplier (simpler VCA with polarity shifts). Bandwidth DC–20 kHz+ lets it double as audio-rate ring mod.

patchIdeas.name: AHDSR via quadrature
patchIdeas.patch: Yellow Play Mode: Transient · Green Play Mode: Hold · Quadrature switch right · yellow Rise = Attack, yellow Fall = Release, green Rise = Decay, green Fall = Sustain time · green attenuverter sets Sustain level · take Max Output · fires full AHDSR from one gate patched to yellow trigger.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Yellow Mode: Transient
* Green Mode: Hold
* Quadrature: ON
* Green Attenuverter: Sustain level

- Gate (Out) g> FALISTRI.Yellow (Trig)
- FALISTRI (Max Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Bouncing ball envelope
patchIdeas.patch: Yellow Loop mode · yellow attenuverted output → yellow Fall CV · each cycle feeds back and shortens the fall · envelope self-accelerates like a bouncing ball · trigger manual button to restart.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Yellow Mode: Loop
* Yellow Attenuverter: ~2 o'clock

- FALISTRI.Yellow (Attenuverted Out) >> FALISTRI.Yellow (Fall CV) // positive FB shortens fall

patchIdeas.name: Undertone via On Rest
patchIdeas.patch: Green back-panel On Rest · feed steady clock into green trigger at ~300 Hz · green Rise/Fall set for ~900 Hz function cycle · green now divides incoming trigger rate by /3, producing a sub-octave formant · bipolar output through a VCA into mixer.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Green Back Switch: On Rest
* Green Mode: Transient

- Clock (Out) t> FALISTRI.Green (Trig)
- FALISTRI.Green (Bipolar Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Single-module synth voice
patchIdeas.patch: Yellow as audio oscillator (Time Scale down, Loop mode, V/Oct from sequencer) · green as envelope (Transient, triggered by gate) · leave 4QM inputs unpatched — semi-norm brings yellow unipolar into 4QM1 and green bipolar into 4QM2 · 4QM output is oscillator × envelope — the complete voice.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Yellow: Loop, Time Scale short
* Green: Transient, Time Scale long
* 4QM inputs: unpatched (semi-norm)

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> FALISTRI.Yellow (V/Oct)
- Gate (Out) g> FALISTRI.Green (Trig)
- FALISTRI (4QM Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Ring-modded dual oscillator
patchIdeas.patch: Both generators at audio rate (Time Scale down, Loop) · yellow tuned to fundamental via V/Oct, green tuned an interval above by detuning Rise/Fall · patch yellow bipolar to 4QM1 and green bipolar to 4QM2 · 4QM output is their ring modulation · modulate Level CV with an envelope for dynamic timbre.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Yellow: Loop, audio rate
* Green: Loop, audio rate

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> FALISTRI.Yellow (V/Oct)
- FALISTRI.Yellow (Bipolar Out) -> FALISTRI (4QM In 1)
- FALISTRI.Green (Bipolar Out) -> FALISTRI (4QM In 2)
- Envelope (Out) >> FALISTRI (4QM Level CV)
- FALISTRI (4QM Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked envelope with divided variant
patchIdeas.patch: Clock into yellow trigger fires an envelope every beat · patch same clock into DCFD Input 1 to get /2 and /4 divisions · /4 triggers green for slow modulation envelopes · one clock now drives three synced but different envelope rates.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Yellow Mode: Transient
* Green Mode: Transient
* DCFD Range: high

- Clock (Out) c> FALISTRI.Yellow (Trig)
- Clock (Out) c> FALISTRI (DCFD In 1)
- FALISTRI (DCFD Out 2) t> FALISTRI.Green (Trig)
- FALISTRI.Yellow (Unipolar Out) >> VCA 1 (CV)
- FALISTRI.Green (Unipolar Out) >> Filter (Cutoff)

patchIdeas.name: Pitch smoothing via slew
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer pitch into Slew input · Slew Rise short, Slew Fall long · portamento glide on descending notes only · output to VCO V/Oct · works as CV smoother for S&H pitches or sample-and-hold.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Slew Rise: CCW (fast)
* Slew Fall: CW (slow)

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> FALISTRI (Slew In)
- FALISTRI (Slew Out) p> VCO (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Force Loop for fake delay
patchIdeas.patch: Green in Transient mode · patch EOR output from yellow → green Force Loop input · each yellow cycle forces green to loop briefly then stop · green fires an amplitude envelope that retriggers for the yellow rise-stage duration · creates echo-like envelope repeats.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Yellow Mode: Transient
* Green Mode: Transient

- Gate (Out) g> FALISTRI.Yellow (Trig)
- FALISTRI.Yellow (EOR) g> FALISTRI.Green (Force Loop)
- FALISTRI.Green (Unipolar Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Sub-octave audio generator
patchIdeas.patch: Patch VCO square wave into DCFD Input 1 · DCFD Range switch low (bipolar ±5 V) · take DCFD Out 1 (-1 oct square) and DCFD Out 2 (-2 oct square) into a mixer with the original · fat three-octave unison bass.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* DCFD Range 1: low (bipolar)
* DCFD Range 2: low (bipolar)

- VCO (Square) -> FALISTRI (DCFD In 1)
- VCO (Square) -> Mixer (In 1)
- FALISTRI (DCFD Out 1) -> Mixer (In 2)
- FALISTRI (DCFD Out 2) -> Mixer (In 3)

patchIdeas.name: Complex LFO with waveshaping
patchIdeas.patch: Yellow Loop, Time Scale long · set Rise Shape CCW (log), Fall Shape CW (expo) · asymmetric bipolar LFO with custom slope profile · V/Oct input from a separate slow LFO inversely modulates rate · very fluid modulation source.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FALISTRI:
* Yellow: Loop, Time Scale long
* Rise Shape: CCW
* Fall Shape: CW

- Slow LFO (Out) >> FALISTRI.Yellow (V/Oct) // inverse rate mod
- FALISTRI.Yellow (Bipolar Out) >> Filter (Cutoff)
